'''Mazanga''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Dug/Legends|Dug]] who served under [[Sebolto]]'s employ who, along with [[Ghazdik Jah]], was wanted by Senators [[Ask Aak/Legends|Ask Aak]] and [[Aks Moe/Legends|Aks Moe]] for the murder of special assistants to the Senators of [[Malastare/Legends|Malastare]]. In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], his bounty worth 3,500 credits alive and 3,000 credits dead. It was claimed by the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]]-turned [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
